metadata.description: X (Twitter) data extraction & automation skill for AI coding agents. 120 endpoints, 2 MCP tools, reads from $0.00015/call.

plugins.name: x-twitter-scraper
plugins.description: 120 REST API endpoints, 2 MCP tools, 23 extraction types. Tweet search, user lookup, follower extraction, engagement metrics, giveaway draws, trending topics, write actions, credits, pay-per-use (MPP), and Telegram integrations. Reads from $0.00015/call — 33x cheaper than the official X API.
